rules.name: Allow: Nextron Systems
rules.description: Allow access to Nextron Systems domains and services (security tools and updates)
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn matches ".*\.nextron-systems\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.huntandhackett\.com$" or dns.fqdn in {"apt.huntandhackett.com" "packages.nextron-systems.com" "update.nextron-systems.com" "portal.nextron-systems.com" "thor.nextron-systems.com" "asgard.nextron-systems.com" "loki.nextron-systems.com" "heimdall.nextron-systems.com"}
